parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(order_date), NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS last_sync FROM orders WHERE source = 'etsy';

INSERT INTO orders (
  order_id, source, order_date,
  buyer_name, buyer_email,
  buyer_street, buyer_city, buyer_zip, buyer_country,
  items_json,
  subtotal, shipping_cost, total, currency,
  status, is_digital
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.order_id}}', '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.order_date}}',
  {{$json.buyer_name    ? `'${$json.buyer_name.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`    : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.buyer_email   ? `'${$json.buyer_email.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`   : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.buyer_street  ? `'${$json.buyer_street.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`  : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.buyer_city    ? `'${$json.buyer_city.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`    : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.buyer_zip     ? `'${$json.buyer_zip.replace(/'/g, "''")}'`     : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.buyer_country ? `'${$json.buyer_country.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL'}},
  '{{$json.items_json}}'::jsonb,
  {{$json.subtotal ?? 'NULL'}}, {{$json.shipping_cost ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.total ?? 'NULL'}}, '{{$json.currency}}',
  '{{$json.status}}', {{$json.is_digital}}
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status        = EXCLUDED.status,
  items_json    = EXCLUDED.items_json,
  subtotal      = EXCLUDED.subtotal,
  shipping_cost = EXCLUDED.shipping_cost,
  total         = EXCLUDED.total,
  updated_at    = NOW()
WHERE orders.status != 'completed';
